      have : y ∣ (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) := ⟨4 * x + y, by rw [← hS.1]; ring⟩
      rwa [← Int.natAbs_dvd_natAbs_iff, Int.natAbs_ofNat, Int.natAbs_of_nonneg hS.2.2.le] at this
    rcases hk.out.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd _ h_dvd with hy | hy
    · have : y = 1 := by linarith [hS.2.2, (Int.natAbs_eq_iff (n := 1)).mp hy]
      subst this
      have : x = k := by linarith [hS.1]
      subst this
      simp [singletonFixedPoint]
    · have : y = 4 * k + 1 := by linarith [hS.2.2, (Int.natAbs_eq_iff (n := 4 * k + 1)).mp hy]
      nlinarith [hS.1, hS.2.1, k_pos k]
  · rintro rfl
    simp [IsFixedPt, secondInvo, secondInvo_fun, Subtype.ext_iff, k_pos k]

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hxpos, hypos⟩, hU⟩ := t
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at ht
    have hyz : y = z := by linarith
    have hz : z = 1 := by
      have h_prod : z * (4 * x + z) = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← hS, hyz]; ring
      have : z.natAbs ∣ 4 * k + 1 := by
        rw [← Int.natAbs_ofNat (4 * k + 1), ← h_prod, Int.natAbs_mul]; apply dvd_mul_right
      obtain (h1 | h2) := hk.out.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd _ this
      · exact Int.eq_one_of_natAbs_eq_one h1 (by linarith)
      · rw [Int.natAbs_eq_iff] at h2; nlinarith [k_pos k]
    ext <;> simp [hz, hyz] at *
    rw [← hS, hyz, hz] at *; linarith
  · intro ht
    rw [Finset.mem_singleton] at ht
    simp [ht, IsFixedPt, secondInvo, secondInvo_fun]
    ext <;> simp

rcases t with ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS1, hx, hy⟩, hU⟩
    have hyz : y = z := by linarith
    have : y.natAbs ∣ 4 * k + 1 := by
      use (4 * x + y).natAbs
      rw [← Int.natAbs_mul, hyz, ← pow_two, ← mul_add, mul_comm, hS1, Int.natAbs_ofNat]
    cases' hk.out.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd y.natAbs this with h h
    · have : y = 1 := by rw [← Int.natAbs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hy), h]; rfl
      simp [this, hyz] at hS1 ⊢
      linarith
    · have : y = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← Int.natAbs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt hy), h]; rfl
      rw [this, hyz] at hS1
      linarith [k_pos k, hx, hS1]
  · intro ht
    simp [singletonFixedPoint, fixedPoints, IsFixedPt, secondInvo, secondInvo_fun] at *
    subst ht
    rfl

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ := t
    simp [Subtype.mk.injEq, Prod.mk.injEq] at ht
    have hyz : y = z := by linarith
    have h_eq : y.natAbs * (4 * x + y).natAbs = 4 * k + 1 := by
      rw [← Int.natAbs_mul, ← hyz] at hS; linarith [hS.1]
    have h_y_abs : y.natAbs = 1 := by
      have := hk.out.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd _ (dvd_mul_right y.natAbs (4 * x + y).natAbs)
      rw [h_eq] at this
      apply this.resolve_right
      intro h
      have : (4 * x + y).natAbs = 1 := by
        rwa [h, mul_comm, Nat.mul_right_eq_self_iff (by linarith [k_pos])] at h_eq
      have := Int.natAbs_eq_one.mp this; linarith [hS.2.1, hS.2.2]
    have hy : y = 1 := by linarith [Int.natAbs_eq_one.mp h_y_abs, hS.2.2]
    have hx : x = k := by linarith [hS.1, hy, hyz]
    have hz : z = 1 := by linarith [hy, hyz]
    ext <;> simp [hx, hy, hz]

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ := t
    have : y = z := by linarith
    have h : y * (4 * x + y) = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← hS.1, ‹y = z›]; ring
    have hy : y = 1 := by
      have h_nat : y.toNat * (4 * x + y).toNat = 4 * k + 1 := by
        rw [← Int.toNat_mul hS.2.2.le (by linarith [hS.2.1, hS.2.2]).le, h]; rfl
      cases hk.out.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd _ ⟨_, h_nat⟩ with
      | inl h1 => exact Int.toNat_inj.mp (by rw [h1]; rfl)
      | inr h1 =>
        have : 4 * x + y = 1 := Int.toNat_inj.mp (by
          rw [h1, mul_comm, h1] at h_nat
          simp [Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_self_right (by linarith) h_nat])
        linarith [hS.2.1]
    have hx : x = k := by linarith [hy, h, ‹y = z›]
    have hz : z = 1 := by linarith [hy, h, ‹y = z›]
    simp [hx, hy, hz, singletonFixedPoint]
  · intro ht
    simp [singletonFixedPoint, IsFixedPt, secondInvo, secondInvo_fun, k_pos] at ht ⊢
    exact ht

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS, hx, hy⟩, hU⟩ := t
    have hyz : y = z := by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff] at ht
      linarith
    have h_abs : y.natAbs * (4 * x + y).natAbs = 4 * k + 1 := by
      rw [← Int.natAbs_mul, ← Int.natAbs_ofNat (4 * k + 1), ← hS, hyz]; ring
    cases hk.out.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd _ ⟨_, h_abs.symm⟩ with h h
    · have : y = 1 := Int.eq_one_of_natAbs_eq_one h (by nlinarith)
      subst this hyz
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff] at hS ⊢
      linarith
    · have : 4 * x + y = 1 := Int.eq_one_of_natAbs_eq_one (by
        rw [h, Nat.mul_right_eq_self_iff (hk.out.pos)] at h_abs; exact h_abs) (by nlinarith)
      nlinarith

have hyz : y = z := by linarith
    subst hyz
    have h_eq : y * (4 * x + y) = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← hS.1]; ring
    have hy1 : y = 1 := by
      have : y.natAbs ∣ 4 * k + 1 := ⟨(4 * x + y).natAbs, by rw [← Int.natAbs_mul, h_eq]; simp⟩
      rcases hk.out.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd _ this with h | h
      · exact Int.eq_one_of_natAbs_eq_one h hS.2.2
      · have : y = 4 * k + 1 := by linarith [Int.natAbs_of_nonneg hS.2.2.le]
        nlinarith [h_eq, hS.2.1, k_pos k]
    subst hy1
    have hxk : x = k := by linarith [h_eq]
    subst hxk
    simp [singletonFixedPoint]
  · intro ht
    simp [singletonFixedPoint] at ht
    subst ht
    simp [IsFixedPt, secondInvo, secondInvo_fun]

have : z = y := by linarith
    subst this
    have hyf : y * (4 * x + y) = 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith [hS]
    have : y = 1 := by
      have : y.natAbs ∣ 4 * k + 1 := ⟨(4 * x + y).natAbs, by rw [← Int.natAbs_mul, hyf, Int.natAbs_ofNat]⟩
      cases' hk.out.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd this with h h
      · rw [Int.natAbs_eq_iff] at h; linarith
      · rw [Int.natAbs_eq_iff] at h; linarith [hx, k_pos k]
    subst this
    have : x = k := by nlinarith [hyf]
    subst this
    simp [singletonFixedPoint]
  · intro h; simp [h]
    exact ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ := t
    have hyz : y = z := by linarith
    have hy_dvd : y.toNat ∣ 4 * k + 1 := ⟨(4 * x + y).toNat, by
      rw [← Int.toNat_mul, ← hyz, ← hS.1]; norm_cast; linarith [hS.2.1, hS.2.2]⟩
    obtain hy1 | hyk := hk.out.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd y.toNat hy_dvd
    · have : y = 1 := by rwa [Int.toNat_eq_iff hS.2.2] at hy1
      subst this; have : z = 1 := by linarith
      subst this; have : x = k := by linarith [hS.1]
      subst this; rfl
    · have : y = 4 * k + 1 := by rwa [Int.toNat_eq_iff hS.2.2] at hyk
      exfalso; nlinarith [hS.1, hS.2.1, k_pos k, hyz, this]
  · intro ht; simp at ht; subst ht; rfl

obtain ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hU⟩ := t
    have hyz : y = z := by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff] at ht
      linarith
    have hprod : y * (4 * x + y) = 4 * k + 1 := by linarith [hS.1]
    have : y = 1 ∨ y = 4 * k + 1 := by
      have h_abs : y.natAbs * (4 * x + y).natAbs = 4 * k + 1 := by
        rw [← Int.natAbs_mul, hprod]; simp
      have := hk.out.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd _ ⟨_, h_abs⟩
      rcases Int.natAbs_eq_natAbs_iff.1 this with h | h <;> linarith [hS.2.2]
    rcases this with h | h
    · rw [Finset.mem_singleton]; ext <;> simp [h, hyz] at * <;> linarith
    · exfalso; linarith [hS.2.1, k_pos k]
  · intro ht
    simp [ht, singletonFixedPoint, secondInvo, secondInvo_fun, IsFixedPt]
    ext <;> simp [singletonFixedPoint]
